description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun-style rifle with a robust, angular design and a predominantly black and red color scheme. The stock is adjustable and collapsible, featuring a thick, textured buttpad for recoil absorption. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal and polymer, with multiple rails for accessory mounting and a visible shell carrier on the side. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and a prominent charging handle, and the magazine appears to be a detachable box type, with several red shotgun shells displayed below. The overall build suggests a focus on durability and modularity, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The surface finish is matte with some grippy textures for secure handling.
description: A modern tactical shotgun-style rifle with a black and red finish, collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine. Features include iron sights, accessory rails, and a visible shell carrier.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the collapsible stock, shell carrier, accessory rails, and the detachable box magazine with shells displayed below.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the slim top profile of the receiver and handguard.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the shell carrier, charging handle, and the overall length of the rifle, with the magazine and shells visible below.
